name: Orange Upside-Down Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the first gelatin in orange juice. Add sugar and stir over low heat until dissolved.
2. Chill until slightly thickened but not set.
3. Arrange orange sections on bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
4. Pour the gelatin mixture over oranges; chill until thickened again but not set.
5. Soften the second gelatin in orange juice; stir over low heat until dissolved.
6. Combine cream cheese, sugar and peel, mixing at medium speed on electric mixer until well blended.
7. Gradually add the gelatin mixture, mixing until well blended.
8. Chill until slightly thickened; fold in whipped cream.
9. Pour over oranges; chill.
10. Combine crumbs, cinnamon and melted margarine; gently press onto top of cake.
11. Chill.
12. Loosen from rim of pan; invert onto serving plate. Remove rim of pan.
